title: Python Codegen Completion

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: The previous completion claim only proved generated adapter coverage; the user clarified that Python is not complete while hand-owned cli.py entrypoints remain and future targets must not silently rely on Python internals.

canonical_core.next_action: Reconcile the Python completion gate against #892: prove no hand-owned cli.py front doors remain outside generated Python surfaces, then either close this lane or record the exact remaining Python-only gap.

execution_run.what happened: Root and planning front-door slices were committed/pushed, then agentic-memory was migrated to `repo_memory_bootstrap.generated_cli_entrypoint` with hand-owned runtime primitives moved from `packages/memory/src/repo_memory_bootstrap/cli.py` to `_runtime_cli.py`.
execution_run.scope touched: root, planning, and memory Python front-door/runtime ownership metadata; generated runtime command metadata; generated-command proof checks; focused tests; this execplan and state.toml
execution_run.changed surfaces: packages/memory/pyproject.toml; packages/memory/src/repo_memory_bootstrap/generated_cli_entrypoint.py; packages/memory/src/repo_memory_bootstrap/_runtime_cli.py; root memory delegation imports; generated TypeScript memory runtime metadata; generator runtime command metadata; focused proof/tests; this execplan and state.toml
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py packages/memory/tests -q; uv run ruff check packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests src/agentic_workspace/_runtime_cli.py scripts/check tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py packages/command-generation/src tests/test_workspace_start_preflight_cli.py tests/test_workspace_implement_cli.py; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python -m repo_memory_bootstrap.generated_cli_entrypoint list-skills --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: root, planning, and memory front-door slices are proven; run the final Python completion reconciliation before claiming #892 Python lane completion
execution_run.next step: Commit and push the memory front-door slice, then run the Python completion reconciliation gate.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
